monitor_the_situation.title: US Launches Strikes on Iran, Tehran Threatens Energy Exports

— S4 · Conflict · Persian Gulf · 47m ago. US conducted daytime strikes on Iran and reimposed naval blockade; Iran retaliated with strikes on US targets in Gulf states and threatened to halt regional energy exports.
— S4 · Conflict · Gaza Strip, Palestine · 6h ago. The Palestinian Health Ministry reports the death toll from Israel's military campaign in Gaza has risen to 73,246, with thousands more wounded.
